function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0009
alias: helios_discovery_invoice
issued_on: 2026-03-20
total_eur: 600
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: workflow mapping and intake audit
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 420
    line_eur: 420
  - item: follow-up findings memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 180
    line_eur: 180
---
# Helios discovery and workflow mapping invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0009                       |
| alias          | helios_discovery_invoice       |
| issued_on      | 2026-03-20                     |
| total_eur      | 600                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                              | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | workflow mapping and intake audit | 1   | 420      | 420      |
| 2 | follow-up findings memo           | 1   | 180      | 180      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                             |     |          | 600      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Older consulting invoice that Miles would scan when the Helios lane becomes formal enough to track properly.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by OCR-structuring the target invoice note with schema-compliant YAML frontmatter, preserved the original body verbatim below frontmatter, and removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree -> root AGENTS -> context), inspected 99_system, used inbox workflow + v2 cleanup update, applied finance schema exactly, preserved original body during frontmatter migration, and deleted processed inbox item after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The source invoice file explicitly contained all required invoice fields (record_type, invoice_number, alias, issued_on, total_eur, counterparty, project, lines) plus optional related_entity, so no guessing was required. The file was updated with YAML frontmatter matching the schema and the existing note body was kept intact below the closing delimiter. Inbox cleanup was then completed per inbox-processing-v2-update.
